items.title: COCO JSON export
items.text: Turn on 'Also write COCO JSON' (Settings → Storage) to save annotations in COCO format next to the YOLO files — for Detectron2, MMDetection and other frameworks. Each object gets a bbox, area and polygon; with a val split you get separate train/val files.

items.title: Segmentation export (YOLO-seg)
items.text: Turn on 'Export segmentation labels' (Settings → Storage) to write polygon outlines instead of boxes, so you can train instance segmentation. Pairs with the Polygon tool.

items.title: New Polygon tool
items.text: Click to drop points connected by straight lines (no dragging) and close by clicking the first point, double-clicking or pressing Enter. Perfect for irregular SFX shapes.

items.title: Updates tab & seamless auto-update
items.text: Settings → Updates: choose Automatic or Manual, install a specific version to roll back, and see your current version. Updates install themselves on next start with no restart prompt.
